properties.description: Detects execution of suspicious or obfuscated PowerShell commands, such as AMSI bypasses or encoded payloads, using either Sysmon or PowerShell Operational Logs.
properties.query:
union Event, SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "FromBase64String" or CommandLine|contains has "amsi" or CommandLine|contains has "IEX" or CommandLine|contains has "Invoke-Obfuscation" or CommandLine|contains has "DownloadString") and Channel == "Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell/Operational" and (Message|contains has "FromBase64String" or Message|contains has "amsi" or Message|contains has "IEX" or Message|contains has "Invoke-Obfuscation" or Message|contains has "DownloadString")
